---
name: "BandFan Mobile Migration UI"
description: "Use when defining the companion app's mobile UX direction, navigation, player scope, or screen structure."
applyTo: "docs/context.md, docs/scope.md, docs/mobile-ui-spec.md, docs/open-questions.md, docs/backlog.md"
---
# Mobile UI Guidance

- Keep the mobile app fan-focused and mobile-first.
- Do not drag over desktop route chrome, floating-window behavior, or full player parity from the web app.
- Preserve BandFan's identity at the level of product tone, color logic, and tactile interaction, but simplify aggressively for mobile.
- Keep navigation shallow and the player simple.
- Treat Discovery and Liked as the primary surfaces.
- Follow `docs/mobile-ui-spec.md` for exact palette, border, shadow, shape, spacing, and ergonomic defaults.
- Bias high-frequency actions toward the lower-right and lower-center thumb zone.
- Keep playback controls physically differentiated: the primary play action should be the largest control in the cluster, with secondary transport controls grouped around it.
